title: Xtra Crunchy Korean Blackberries Songpyeon
description: A crunchy and earthy Korean dish featuring blackberries and lardons, perfect for a post-workout snack, made without onion or garlic.
instructions: Render the lardons in a pan over medium heat until crispy and golden brown.
In a large bowl, combine the rice flour, sesame oil, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a few blackberries in the center.
Fold the dough over the blackberries to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Pan-fry the songpyeon in a little sesame oil until they are golden brown and crispy.
Sprinkle the chopped pine nuts over the songpyeon and serve with the crispy lardons.
